content:
1. Paginates a list (1-indexed) into a dict of slice + metadata. Quick migration helper under time pressure.
2. Off-by-one in slice calc (start=page*size); page>total_pages returns empty list; page_size<=0 or huge values.
3. Page>total_pages behavior (noted as open).
4. page=0/neg (clamped), page_size<=0, non-list items, total_pages overflow, concurrent mutation of items.
